showcases.title: SaaS Dashboard
showcases.description: 14-page analytics dashboard with KPI cards, kanban boards, inbox, status monitoring, and changelog. Built from the saas-dashboard archetype with auradecantism dark styling.

showcases.title: eCommerce Admin
showcases.description: 15-page merchant administration panel with product management, order kanban, customer CRM, inventory tracking, and file manager. Built from the ecommerce-admin archetype with auradecantism light styling.

showcases.title: Gaming Platform
showcases.description: Guild hub with leaderboards, news feed, member profiles, and game collections. Built from the gaming-platform archetype.

showcases.title: Portfolio
showcases.description: Full-bleed brand landing page with hero, feature grid, testimonials, and showcase gallery. Built from the portfolio archetype.

showcases.title: Cloud Platform
showcases.description: Cloud infrastructure platform with marketing landing page and dashboard. App management, deploy logs, services, usage monitoring, and billing. Built from the cloud-platform archetype.
